message:
Running command: # 48 files still have old hash - these are likely binary ODB files (not text)
# Let's check what file types still contain the old hash
grep -rl "8afc8346" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo "---extensions---"
grep -rl "8afc8346" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*\.//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -10
